shots.description: night rain on an industrial service road; a lone technician approaches a distant concrete render facility
wide static view of the abandoned facility, sodium light, rain haze, human figure very small
wet concrete entrance under flickering security light; sealed metal door dominates frame
gloved hand opens corroded access panel; green indicator pulse reflected in rainwater
heavy door opens halfway and jams against the technician; darkness behind threshold
long handheld corridor tracking shot; dead monitors, hanging cables, leaking water
monitor wall repeats unfinished render frame; technician reflection visible in black glass
concrete stairwell descent, red emergency practical light, mist, controlled handheld tension
wide reveal of server-machine room; central render machine glowing cold blue through dust
technician framed small against huge machine; slow push-in, fan vibration in frame
macro close-up of old red kill switch; wet sleeve; human hesitation
switch pulled down; hard mechanical snap; sparks jump from machine housing
machine room floods with broken red-white projection, smoke, rolling shutter stress, panic light
near-black machine room; fans spin down; dust visible in emergency light
monitor freezes then collapses to black; faint technician reflection remains
technician returns through silent corridor; water drip replaces machine noise
exterior dawn rain; technician exits facility into gray sky
locked-off final wide shot; facility silent in rain; figure leaves frame
